messages.content: What time does the bakery close today?
The bakery closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Hi, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Is the train station within walking distance from here?
Yes, it's about a 15-minute walk if you head east down Main Street.
Can you pass me the salt, please?
Sure, here you go.
Which is heavier, a watermelon or a cantaloupe?
A watermelon is usually heavier — most watermelons weigh between 10 and 20 pounds, while cantaloupes typically weigh 3 to 5 pounds.
How do I reset my alarm on this phone?
Open the Clock app, tap the alarm you want to change, and then press the edit button to adjust the time.
Do you have any siblings?
I have two brothers and one sister.
Count the chairs in this room for me.
There are four chairs — one by the window, two at the table, and one in the corner.
So you're moving to Portland next month, right?
Yes, I'm relocating for a new job at the tech company downtown.
What's the capital of Australia?
Canberra is the capital of Australia.
Did your daughter enjoy the concert last weekend?
She had a great time. The orchestra played her favorite pieces and the venue was beautiful.
Turn off the lights when you leave, okay?
Will do — I'll make sure they're off before I go.
How many days until your birthday?
My birthday is in 12 days, on the 23rd.
Is coffee better hot or cold?
That depends on your preference. Most people drink it hot, but cold brew is refreshing on warm days.
Where did you find that vintage lamp?
I picked it up at an antique market on the south side of town about two months ago.
Hello! Is anyone home?
Yes, I'm here. Come in — the door's unlocked.
Does your cat get along with dogs?
She's cautious around them, but she's warmed up to my neighbor's golden retriever.
Show me how to tie this knot.
Loop the rope around like this, then pull the end through and tighten — practice a few times and it becomes natural.
Which route takes less time to the airport?
The highway bypass is faster in most traffic conditions — saves about 10 minutes compared to the downtown route.
Did you remember to buy milk at the store?
Yes, I got a gallon of whole milk and left it in the fridge.
Do you know if Marcus is coming to the meeting tomorrow?
He sent a message saying he'll be there by 10 AM.
Hi! How's your day going?
It's been good, thanks for asking. How about yours?
Can you help me move this table to the living room?
Sure, I'll grab the other end and we can slide it across together.
Is blue or green better for painting the bedroom walls?
Green tends to feel more calming, while blue is cooler and more modern.
How do I reset my password?
Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen and follow the email verification steps.
Did you remember to buy milk at the store?
Yes, it's in the fridge on the second shelf.
How many people are invited to the dinner party on Saturday?
There are eight guests coming, plus the two of us, so ten total.
Where does Elena work?
She works at the hospital downtown as a nurse.
Can I use your umbrella before I leave?
Of course, it's by the door. Just bring it back tomorrow.
What's the first step in making pasta from scratch?
Mix flour and eggs together until it forms a shaggy dough.
Is the gym open on Sunday mornings?
Yes, it opens at 8 AM and closes at 7 PM on Sundays.
Good evening! Did you watch the game last night?
I didn't catch it, but I heard it was pretty exciting. Who won?
Which route to the airport is faster during rush hour?
The highway usually gets congested, so taking the back roads through the valley is quicker.
Tell me the ingredients for lemonade.
You need lemons, water, sugar, and a pinch of salt for the best flavor.
Does David have experience with gardening?
Yes, he's been growing vegetables for about five years now.
How many chapters are in that book you're reading?
There are twenty-two chapters, and I'm halfway through.
Should I bring dessert or drinks to the potluck?
The host mentioned they already have someone bringing a cake, so drinks would be really helpful.
When did you last see Rachel?
We grabbed coffee together about two weeks ago.
Turn off the lights before you leave, okay?
Will do. I'll make sure everything is switched off.
What time does the museum close today?
It closes at 5 PM on weekdays.
Hi, is this the right platform for the train to Boston?
Yes, this is platform 3 — that's the correct one for Boston.
Can you tell me how to reset my password?
Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, then check your email for the reset link.
Do you have this jacket in a medium?
Let me check — yes, we have a medium in black and navy.
How many pages is that document?
It's 12 pages long.
Please pass the salt.
Here you go.
Is the grocery store still open?
Yes, it stays open until 10 PM tonight.
What's the difference between these two laptops?
The main difference is the processor — the silver one is faster but more expensive.
Should I bring an umbrella tomorrow?
Yes, there's rain expected in the afternoon.
How do I get to the library from here?
Go straight down this street for two blocks, then turn left at the traffic light.
Can you recommend a good Italian restaurant nearby?
There's a place called Marco's about five minutes away — they have great pasta.
Is my appointment on Tuesday or Wednesday?
It's on Wednesday at 3 PM.
How many calories are in a banana?
A medium banana has about 105 calories.
Turn down the volume, please.
Done — is that better?
Does this shirt need to be ironed?
It could use a light ironing, especially on the collar.
What's the fastest route to the airport?
Take the highway exit at mile marker 12 — it'll save you about 15 minutes.
Hello, do you work here?
Yes, I do. How can I help you?
Which flavor do you prefer — chocolate or vanilla?
I'd say chocolate is more popular, but vanilla is classic.
Can you show me how to tie this knot?
Sure — loop the rope once, then pull the end through and tighten it.
Is there a parking fee in this lot?
Yes, it's $5 for the first two hours, then $2 per hour after that.
Is it raining outside right now?
Yes, it's been raining for the past hour.
Hey, how's it going?
Pretty good, thanks for asking. How about you?
Can you help me find my keys?
Of course. Where did you last remember having them?
Which is bigger, a lemon or an orange?
An orange is usually bigger than a lemon.
How do I boil water for pasta?
Fill a pot with water, put it on high heat, and wait until it starts bubbling.
Count the chairs in this room.
There are four chairs—one at the desk, two by the window, and one by the door.
My dog ate my sandwich yesterday.
That must have been frustrating. Dogs do love stealing food when they get the chance.
Do you like coffee?
I don't drink coffee, but I know lots of people who start their day with it.
What's your name?
I'm Claude, an AI assistant.
Please turn off the lights when you leave.
I'll make sure to turn them off before I go.
How many days until your birthday?
My birthday is in two weeks, so fourteen days from now.
Does Marcus work here?
Yes, Marcus works in the accounting department on the third floor.
Hello! Is this the customer service line?
Hello, yes it is. How can I help you today?
Which book should I read first, the mystery or the romance?
That depends on your mood—the mystery is page-turning, while the romance is slower and more emotional.
Show me the steps to make a cup of tea.
Boil water, add it to a mug with a tea bag, let it steep for three to five minutes, then remove the bag and add milk or honey if you like.
How many students are in the class?
There are twenty-three students enrolled this semester.
I forgot to call Sarah on her birthday.
You could still reach out and apologize—most people understand that birthdays can slip your mind sometimes.
Are these shoes comfortable?
They're pretty comfortable for walking, though the heel took a bit of breaking in.
Tell me what's in this box.
It contains old photographs, a diary, and some letters from the 1980s.
What time does the library close today?
The library closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Hi, do you have a minute?
Of course, what's on your mind?
Can you pass the salt?
Sure, here you go.
Is it supposed to rain tomorrow?
Yes, there's a chance of rain in the afternoon.
How many eggs do we need for the recipe?
You'll need three eggs.
Which one is bigger — the blue notebook or the red one?
The red notebook is bigger.
Tell me the steps to reset the printer.
First, turn it off and unplug it. Wait 30 seconds, then plug it back in and turn it on again.
Did Marcus call yesterday?
No, he didn't.
What's your favorite season?
I'd say spring — the weather is mild and everything blooms.
How do I get to the train station from here?
Turn left at the corner, walk two blocks, and you'll see it on your right.
Do you remember where I put my keys?
I think you left them on the kitchen counter this morning.
What does 'ambient' mean?
It means relating to the surroundings or environment around something.
Should I bring an umbrella?
That would be a good idea — the forecast looks cloudy.
How many people are coming to the party?
About fifteen, so far.
Is this coffee still hot?
It's lukewarm — I'd heat it up if you want it hot.
Where does your sister work?
She works at a veterinary clinic downtown.
Can you spell 'accommodate' for me?
A-C-C-O-M-M-O-D-A-T-E.
Do you prefer tea or coffee?
I prefer coffee in the morning.
What's the date today?
Today is November 15th.
How long will the meeting take?
It should be about an hour, maybe a bit less.
Is it raining outside right now?
No, the sun is out. It's a clear day.
How do I reset my phone's password?
Go to Settings, then Security, and look for the password reset option.
Which is warmer—wool or cotton?
Wool tends to be warmer because it traps more heat.
Turn off the lights when you leave.
I will. I'll make sure to switch them off.
What's the capital of France?
Paris is the capital of France.
Do you like spicy food?
I enjoy some heat, but not too extreme.
How many eggs are in the carton?
There are twelve eggs left.
Could you recommend a good movie?
The Shawshank Redemption is a classic that most people enjoy.
Is Tuesday before Wednesday?
Yes, Tuesday comes before Wednesday.
Show me how to tie a basic knot.
Cross one end over the other, then loop it around and pull tight.
What color is the sky on a clear day?
On a clear day, the sky is blue.
Good morning, did you sleep well?
Good morning! Yes, I slept fine. How about you?
Does the store have any apples in stock?
Yes, we have fresh red and green apples.
Tell me the steps to make tea.
Boil water, put a tea bag in a cup, pour the water, and let it steep for a few minutes.
Is pizza better than pasta?
That depends on what you prefer, but they're both delicious Italian dishes.
Where do I find the restroom?
The restroom is down the hall, second door on your left.
Can you count to five for me?
One, two, three, four, five.
Is it raining outside right now?
No, it's sunny and clear at the moment.
Hi, how are you doing today?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Please remind me what my appointment was for tomorrow.
You have a dentist appointment scheduled for 2 PM tomorrow.
Which is faster, driving or taking the train to the airport?
The train is usually faster during rush hour, but driving might be quicker late at night.
How do I reset my password?
Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page and follow the email instructions.
How many people are coming to the party on Saturday?
About fifteen people have confirmed so far.
Did you finish reading that book I lent you?
Not yet, but I'm halfway through and really enjoying it.
Good morning, did you sleep well?
Good morning! Yes, I slept quite well, thank you.
Can you turn off the lights when you leave?
Of course, I'll make sure to turn them off.
What's the difference between whole wheat and white bread?
Whole wheat has more fiber and nutrients, while white bread is lighter and milder in taste.
Is Marcus coming to the meeting this afternoon?
Yes, he confirmed he'll be there at 3 PM.
How should I water these plants?
Water them when the soil feels dry to the touch, usually once or twice a week.
How many episodes are in that series?
There are twelve episodes in the first season.
Do you have any plans tonight?
I'm planning to cook dinner and watch a movie with friends.
First, you mix the flour, then what?
Then add the eggs and milk, and stir until the batter is smooth.
Does the store sell organic vegetables?
Yes, they have an organic section in the produce area.
I just got back from the gym.
That's great! How was your workout today?
Where did you put my jacket?
It's hanging on the hook by the front door.
Can you spell that word for me?
Sure, it's spelled W-A-R-D-R-O-B-E.
Can you help me find my keys?
Where did you last remember having them? Check your jacket pockets and the kitchen counter first.
Is it raining outside right now?
Yes, it's been drizzling for the past hour.
Does Marcus prefer coffee or tea?
He usually drinks coffee in the morning, but he likes tea in the evening.
Turn off the lights when you leave.
I'll make sure to turn them off before I go.
How many eggs do we need for the recipe?
The recipe calls for three large eggs.
Did you attend the meeting yesterday?
Yes, I was there from 2 to 4 PM.
Which route should I take to avoid traffic?
Take the back roads through Maple Street — it's usually quieter than the highway.
Do you know where the nearest pharmacy is?
There's one on Fifth Avenue, about a ten-minute walk from here.
What's your favorite sandwich?
I really enjoy a turkey and avocado sandwich with mustard.
Can you send me the document by tomorrow?
Sure, I'll email it to you first thing in the morning.
How long does it take to get to the airport?
About 45 minutes from downtown, depending on traffic.
Is the conference room available at 3 PM?
No, it's booked until 4, but you can use it after that.
What color is your new car?
It's dark gray with a silver trim.
Did Elena finish her project on time?
Yes, she submitted it yesterday evening.
Which floor is the gym on?
The gym is on the third floor, next to the pool.
Can I bring a friend to dinner tonight?
Of course, the more the better. Just let me know so I have enough food.
What's the name of your dog?
His name is Jasper, and he's a golden retriever.
Is this coffee still hot?
Yes, it should still be warm. I poured it about ten minutes ago.
Can you pass me the salt?
Sure, here you go.
Which train arrives first, the 3:15 or the 3:45?
The 3:15 arrives first—it comes in about five minutes.
Do you know where Maya works?
She works at the hospital downtown as a nurse.
How many eggs should I use for the pancakes?
Two eggs should be enough for a batch of four pancakes.
Turn left at the next traffic light.
Got it—turning left at the next light. That should take us to Oak Street.
Is your brother coming to dinner tonight?
No, he has to work late, so it'll just be the three of us.
What's the capital of Portugal?
Lisbon is the capital of Portugal.
Did you remember to lock the front door?
Yes, I locked it right after I came home.
Show me how to tie a bow.
Cross the right loop over the left one, then pull tight and make a knot.
Good morning, David!
Good morning! Hope you slept well.
How many people are signed up for the tournament?
Twelve players registered so far, but registration closes tomorrow.
Would you prefer tea or coffee?
Coffee, please. With a little milk if you have it.
Where did you park the car?
I parked it in the lot behind the building, near the blue dumpster.
Remind me what we need from the grocery store.
Bread, milk, tomatoes, and chicken for tomorrow's dinner.
Is the package supposed to arrive today?
According to the tracking, it should be delivered by 5 PM.
How long have you known Elena?
We've been friends since high school, so about eight years now.
Set a timer for twenty minutes, please.
Done—the timer is running and will go off at 3:20.
Can you help me move this table to the other room?
Of course, I'll grab the other end and we can slide it together.
Is your cat friendly with strangers?
She's shy at first, but once she gets to know someone she's very affectionate.
How many cups of flour do I need for this bread recipe?
You'll need three cups of all-purpose flour.
Did Marcus finish his project before the deadline?
Yes, he submitted it two days early.
Which route is faster to get downtown, the highway or the back roads?
The highway is usually quicker, especially during rush hour.
Good morning! How are you doing today?
Good morning! I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Should I water the plants now or wait until tomorrow?
Wait until tomorrow morning — the soil is still moist from yesterday's watering.
What's the capital of Brazil?
Brasília is the capital of Brazil.
Do you know if the train station has a café?
Yes, there's a small café on the main platform that serves coffee and snacks.
Tell me the steps to reset this printer.
Press and hold the power button for 30 seconds, then turn it back on and wait for it to restart.
How many people are coming to the dinner party?
Eight people confirmed so far, including you and me.
Is Elena taller than her brother?
No, her brother is about two inches taller.
Where did you put my keys?
I saw them on the kitchen counter next to the mailbox.
Do these shoes fit you properly?
They're a little snug in the toe, but overall they're comfortable.
Show me how to tie this knot.
Loop one end over the other, pull it tight, then cross and tuck it through the second loop.
When does your shift end?
I finish at 5 o'clock today.
Is this jacket warmer than the wool one?
The wool one is warmer, but this jacket is lighter and easier to move around in.
How do I get to the parking garage from here?
Go down this hallway, turn left at the elevator, and you'll see the garage entrance on your right.
Did the package arrive yet?
It came this morning — it's in the hall by the front door.
What time does the bakery close today?
It closes at 6 PM on weekdays.
Do you know if Marcus is coming to the meeting?
He sent me a message saying he'll be there by 2 o'clock.
Is your coffee hotter than mine?
Yeah, I just poured it a minute ago, so it's still steaming.
How do I reset my password on this website?
Click 'Forgot Password' at the bottom of the login page, then follow the email link they send you.
How many chapters are in that book?
It has 12 chapters total, plus an epilogue.
Is the train delayed today?
No, it's running on schedule according to the app.
Where did you find that recipe?
I found it in an old cookbook that my grandmother left me.
Can you show me how to tie this knot?
Loop the rope like this, pull it through, then tighten it at the end.
Does your dog have a name?
Yes, his name is Scout.
What's the difference between these two options?
The first one is cheaper but doesn't include shipping, while the second has free delivery.
Did you remember to buy milk at the store?
I did, and I also grabbed some bread and eggs while I was there.
Hello! Haven't seen you in ages.
I know, it's been way too long! How have you been?
Turn off the lights when you leave the room, please.
I'll make sure to do that.
Which color do you prefer, blue or green?
I'd say green — it's calmer and easier on the eyes.
Do you have plans this weekend?
I'm planning to visit my parents on Saturday afternoon.
How many people are on the guest list?
Right now we have 18 confirmed, but a few more might still reply.
What's the weather like outside right now?
It's cloudy and a bit chilly, around 55 degrees.
Should I water the plants today?
Yes, the soil looks pretty dry. They could use a good watering.
Is this sweater machine washable?
Yes, you can wash it on a gentle cycle in cold water.
Hey, how are you doing?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Turn off the lights when you leave the office.
I'll make sure to turn them off before I go.
Which is faster, the bus or the train?
The train is usually faster for that route — about 20 minutes shorter.
Count how many chairs are in the conference room.
There are eight chairs around the table.
My dog ate something strange — should I be worried?
If he's acting normal and eating fine, he's probably okay. But call the vet if he seems sick or won't eat.
Does the museum have free admission on Sundays?
No, admission is the same price every day, but kids under 5 are always free.
Good morning! Ready for the meeting?
Good morning — yes, I've got all my notes ready.
Please water the plants by Friday.
No problem, I'll water them Thursday evening.
Is coffee or tea better for staying awake?
Coffee has more caffeine, so it's stronger for that. Tea works too but takes longer to kick in.
What's the capital of Sweden?
Stockholm is the capital of Sweden.
Can you help me organize these files?
Sure — I can sort them by date or by project type, whichever you prefer.
How many pages is the report supposed to be?
It should be between 10 and 15 pages, not counting the appendix.
Did Marcus call you back yet?
Not yet, but he said he'd call this afternoon.
Show me how to tie this knot.
Loop the rope over, pull it through, then tighten. Would you like me to do it step by step?
Which restaurant serves better seafood — the one by the pier or downtown?
The one by the pier has fresher fish since they get daily deliveries from the boats.
Hello, I'm looking for the electronics section.
That's on the second floor — take the escalator up and it's to your right.
Did you finish the report I sent yesterday?
I've read through it and found three small typos, but overall it looks solid.
Can you turn off the lights when you leave?
Sure, I'll switch them off on my way out.
Is the train station within walking distance from here?
Yes, it's about a 15-minute walk north of here.
How many eggs do I need for this recipe?
You'll need three eggs for the batter.
Which is faster, the bus or the metro?
The metro is usually faster during rush hour, but the bus can be quicker late at night.
Do you know if Marcus is coming to the meeting tomorrow?
I haven't heard from him, but I saw he marked himself as attending on the invite.
Show me how to tie a proper knot.
Start by crossing the rope over itself, then loop it back through and pull tight.
Did you bring your camera to the picnic?
I did — it's in my bag. I wanted to get some photos of the sunset.
Can I borrow your umbrella for the afternoon?
Of course, it's by the door. Just bring it back when you're done.
How long does it usually take to cook pasta?
Most pasta takes about 8 to 10 minutes in boiling water.
Is the new coffee shop near your workplace any good?
It's pretty decent — good espresso and a quiet atmosphere, though a bit pricey.
Tell me the steps to reset this printer.
Hold the reset button for 10 seconds, wait for it to restart, then reconfigure the network settings.
Does your sister still play volleyball?
She did for a couple of years, but she stopped last spring to focus on studies.
What should I wear to the outdoor concert tonight?
Something comfortable and a light jacket — the forecast shows it'll be cool in the evening.
How many people are on your team?
There are five of us, including the project lead.
Is the grocery store open on Sundays?
Yes, but they close earlier — at 7 PM instead of 10 PM on weekdays.
Remember to call the dentist about your appointment.
Thanks for the reminder — I'll do that first thing Monday morning.
Which floor is the fitness center on?
It's on the second floor, next to the pool.
What time does the bakery open on Saturdays?
The bakery opens at 8 AM on Saturdays.
Is your flight arriving before noon?
Yes, it lands at 10:30 AM.
Good morning, how are you doing today?
Good morning! I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How about you?
Can you pass me the salt, please?
Of course, here you go.
Which is warmer, January or July in Chicago?
July is much warmer. January is cold and snowy, while July averages around 75°F.
How do I reset my phone to factory settings?
Go to Settings, then find System or About Phone, and look for a Reset option. Tap it and confirm — your data will be erased.
How many people are coming to dinner tonight?
Six total — Sarah, Marcus, Elena, and three of my work colleagues.
Did you remember to buy groceries?
Yes, I did. I picked up milk, bread, eggs, and vegetables this afternoon.
Show me how to tie a basic knot.
Make a loop with the rope, pull the end through the loop, and tighten. That's the simplest knot.
Is the library closed on Mondays?
No, the library is open Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM.
Hi there, fancy seeing you here!
Hey! Yeah, what a coincidence. I'm just picking up some supplies for the project.
Turn off the lights when you leave the room.
Will do, I'll make sure they're off.
Is your dog's birthday before or after December?
Before — it's on November 14th.
What's the next step in assembling this shelf?
Insert the wooden dowels into the pre-drilled holes, then attach the side panels with screws.
How many chapters are left in your book?
Three more chapters until I finish.
Does the museum charge an entrance fee?
Yes, it's $15 for adults and $8 for children under 12.
Which route is faster to the train station, through downtown or the highway?
The highway is faster — about 20 minutes instead of 35 through downtown traffic.
Can you water the plants while I'm away?
Sure, I'll water them every other day.
When does your lunch break start?
My break starts at noon — I usually take about 45 minutes.
Can you tell me if Marcus is in the office right now?
Marcus stepped out for lunch about twenty minutes ago, but he should be back soon.
How do I reset my phone password?
Go to Settings, tap Security, then select Change Password and follow the prompts.
Is the train platform usually crowded in the morning?
Yes, it gets quite busy between 7 and 9 AM on weekdays.
What's the difference between these two jackets?
The blue one has a zipper, while the gray one has buttons, and the gray one is slightly thicker.
Should I water the plants today?
The soil looks fairly dry, so yes, they could use water this afternoon.
How many chapters are in this book?
There are 12 chapters plus an introduction and appendix.
Hi, do you remember what I ordered last time?
You ordered the grilled salmon with roasted vegetables and the house salad.
Can Jennifer type faster than David?
Jennifer types about 70 words per minute while David types around 55, so yes, Jennifer is faster.
Turn the lights off before you leave.
I'll turn them off right now.
Does this recipe need butter or oil?
It calls for two tablespoons of butter, but you can use vegetable oil as a substitute if you prefer.
Which floor is the accounting department on?
Accounting is on the third floor, near the east stairwell.
Did Sarah finish her exam on time?
Yes, she finished with about ten minutes to spare.
How do you spell that word?
It's spelled A-C-C-O-M-M-O-D-A-T-E.
Is the grocery store open on Sundays?
Yes, it opens at 9 AM and closes at 8 PM on Sundays.
What color is Tom's new car?
It's dark gray with black trim.
Please put these boxes in the storage room.
I'll move them over there now.
How many people signed up for the workshop?
We have 18 registrations so far, with a few more expected by the deadline.
Does the museum have a gift shop?
Yes, there's a gift shop on the main floor near the exit.
Is the road to the lake open in winter?
It usually stays open, but it can get icy, so you'll want to drive carefully.
Do you know if Marcus has arrived yet?
He texted about twenty minutes ago saying he was stuck in traffic, so he should be here soon.
Hi, how's your day going?
Good so far, thanks for asking. I've been organizing my files all morning.
Can you turn off the lights when you leave?
Sure, I'll make sure to turn them off before I go.
Is the coffee stronger than it was yesterday?
Yes, I used more grounds this time because the last batch seemed weak.
Show me how to reset the printer, please.
Press the power button for ten seconds, wait a minute, then turn it back on.
How many people signed up for the workshop?
Fifteen people have registered so far, with three more expected by Friday.
The train is delayed again, isn't it?
Yes, the announcement said twenty minutes behind schedule due to a signal issue.
Where did you put the car keys?
I left them on the kitchen counter next to the fruit bowl.
Does Elena still work at the library?
No, she moved to a different job last month, but I think she's still volunteering there weekends.
What's in the envelope on my desk?
Your landlord sent the lease renewal form inside it.
Should I water the plants now or later?
Water them now — the soil looks quite dry.
Did the package from Portland arrive?
It got delivered yesterday afternoon while you were out.
Can you list the steps to make pasta?
Boil water with salt, add pasta, stir occasionally, cook for about ten minutes until soft, then drain it.
Hello, are you ready to start?
Yes, I've got everything I need right here.
Is your apartment warmer than ours?
Actually, mine gets pretty cold in winter because the radiator doesn't work well.
Tell me what happened at the meeting yesterday.
They discussed the budget cuts and pushed the decision to next month.
How many days until your birthday?
Nineteen days from now, on the twenty-third.
Will you need the conference room tomorrow morning?
No, you can book it. I rescheduled my meeting for the afternoon instead.
What breed is your dog?
She's a golden retriever mix, about six years old.
Can you pass the salt?
Here you go.
Hi, how's your day going?
It's going well, thanks for asking. How about yours?
Does this train stop at Central Station?
Yes, it stops there at 3:15.
How do I reset my password?
Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your email.
